prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-135CKWHSAH-135-WHT-5555 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 13.5 inch Wild Stallion Fixed Blade Collector's Horse Hunting Knife with Ornamental Scabbard Description: The Collectible ASR Outdoor Fixed Blade Animal Head Wildlife Collection Knife with detailed scabbard would be a great addition to any knife collector's mantel, office, or choice of display area.

The Wildlife Fixed Blade Animal Head Knife would also be great for any outdoorsman that wants their blade to be both functional and beautiful. The blade of the knife is 8" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

The blade itself has a great acid etched design to give it some eye catching detail while still being sleek and elegant in style. The scabbard features a beautifully colored picture of the animal spirit in the wilderness while the pommel of the hunting knife features a matching depiction in great detail.

This is truly a wonderful collectors piece to pick up for the knife lover and knife collector who has it all. Search Terms: hunting knife collectible knife for men collectors knives authentic steel blade outdoorsman wolf scabbard hunting dagger knife collectors ornate knives etched design with sheath Features: - Intricately detailed decorative knife with etched blade design, wildlife scene on sheath with intricate animal head on the pommel of the knife; your choice of wildlife animal - Overall knife length is 13.5 inches; Blade length is 8 inches; Fixed blade hunting knife with a straight back blade - Inspired by wildlife and the spirit of America - The scabbard features a beautifully colored picture of the animal spirit in the wilderness while the pommel of the hunting knife features a matching depiction in great detail - Best gift mens knife for any outdoorsman that wants their blade to be both functional and beautiful === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
